session.tool_result:
900→ 901→ result = runner.invoke( 902→ plan_save, 903→ ["--format", "json", "--current-branch", "--session-id", session_id], 904→ obj=ctx, 905→ ) 906→ 907→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 908→ output = json.loads(result.output) 909→ marker_dir = tmp_path / ".erk" / "scratch" / "sessions" / session_id 910→ # Unified plan-saved marker should exist with plan number on first line 911→ plan_saved_marker = marker_dir / "exit-plan-mode-hook.plan-saved.marker" 912→ assert plan_saved_marker.exists(), "plan-saved marker should exist" 913→ marker_content = plan_saved_marker.read_text(encoding="utf-8") 914→ first_line = marker_content.split("\n")[0].strip() 915→ assert first_line == str(output["pr_number"]), "first line should be plan number" 916→ # Old current-branch marker should NOT exist 917→ old_marker = marker_dir / "exit-plan-mode-hook.plan-saved-current-branch.marker" 918→ assert not old_marker.exists(), "plan-saved-current-branch marker should NOT exist" 919→ # Issue and branch markers should still exist 920→ assert (marker_dir / "plan-saved-issue.marker").exists() 921→ assert (marker_dir / "plan-saved-branch.marker").exists() 922→

110→ 111→def _update_objective_nodes( 112→ *, 113→ objective_issue: int, 114→ node_ids: tuple[str, ...], 115→ plan_number: int, 116→ repo_root: Path, 117→) -> bool: 118→ """Update objective roadmap nodes to in_progress with the plan PR reference. 119→ 120→ Uses the Graceful Degradation Pattern: this is an optional operation that 121→ should not block plan saving if it fails. 122→ 123→ Args: 124→ objective_issue: Objective issue number. 125→ node_ids: Roadmap node IDs to update. 126→ plan_number: The plan PR number to reference. 127→ repo_root: Repository root for cwd. 128→ 129→ Returns: 130→ True if the update succeeded, False otherwise. 131→ """ 132→ cmd = [ 133→ "erk", 134→ "exec", 135→ "update-objective-node", 136→ str(objective_issue), 137→ ] 138→ for node_id in node_ids: 139→ cmd.extend(["--node", node_id])
